_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-002 (LS, cosine: 0.524), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.422). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [identify, organizational, policy] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.908, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.059 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:8.1%, N:71.0%, C:20.8%). No dominant classification for "Identify organizational policy stakeholders." vs "Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who genera" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 > STS 0.422 (gap +0.103). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholders] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [identify, organizational, policy]. WIDAI-only: [ability, bridge, business, consume, data, effective].
